responses.summary: TESTING.md generation broken — sed pipe lost template content. Replaced sed r/stdin with bash parameter expansion: ${content//{{DOMAIN_SECTION}}/$domain_section}. Verified full template + domain section now renders.
** glob not recursive on bash 3.2. Replaced with find -maxdepth 3 -name '*.ipynb'. Portable across bash 3.x and 4.x+.
